description: Style Note This summer is the season of mixing it up with fusion fashion - creations by mineral are spot on when it comes to that elusive cohesive combination of trends. This dress is perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make heads turn without losing her cool. Modern and innovative design details sets this piece above the rest. Product DetailsOff-white sleeveless dress, has a bucket neckline, embroidered panel on the front yoke with trims around it, gathers from below the bust, a flaring skirt and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in warm waterDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowUse warm ironSize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
